subcodes.first_line: Shoghi Mine, this dream is a good one. Rest assured that to have attained the presence of His Holiness the Exalted One
subcodes.first_line_orig: شوقی من این خواب بسیار خوبست مطمئن باش تشرف بحضور حضرت اعلی روحی له الفدا
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
